infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Ultimate CashBook uses your camera to take photos for your profile and to attach receipts to entries.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Ultimate CashBook accesses your photo library to set a profile photo and to attach receipt images to entries.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Ultimate CashBook accesses your contacts to quickly add customers and suppliers.

plugins.photosPermission: Ultimate CashBook accesses your photos to set a profile photo and attach receipts to entries.
plugins.cameraPermission: Ultimate CashBook uses your camera to take a profile photo and capture receipts for entries.
